[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001111 4
1 1000001 2
2 0100001 2
3 0000000 a
4 1010010 3
5 1101010 4
6 1111011 6
7 1000001 2

12 21 0000001 1
23 32 0000001 1
34 43 0000000 a match 3
45 54 0000000 a match 3
56 65 1000000 1
67 76 1000000 1
70 07 0100000 1

24 42 0000000 a match 3
35 53 0000000 a match 3

72 27 1000000 1
